coastal.title: Vancouver Whitecaps game in Chicago rescheduled due to wildfire smoke
coastal.description: 'The decision was made with the health and safety of fans, players, staff and all event personnel as the top priority,' a statement from Chicago Fire read.

coastal.title: 7 structures damaged in past 24 hours due to massive wildfire near Boston Bar
coastal.description: The Brunswick Creek and Ainslie Creek wildfires are both thousands of hectares in size and have previously triggered other evacuation orders in the area.

coastal.title: Village of Pemberton on evacuation alert due to out-of-control wildfire
coastal.description: The Signal Hill fire was reported late on Wednesday afternoon, about five kilometres south of Highway 99, and is currently estimated to be 10 hectares in size.

all.title: Canada wildfire smoke blankets US skies across the Midwest and Northeast, triggering health alerts
all.description: Air quality levels are forecast to drop to unhealthy levels across the U.S. Midwest and Northeast on Tuesday as smoke from Canadian wildfires intensifies. AirNow’s Fire and Smoke Map showed the regions blanketed in yellow due to the drifting smoke. Winds from the northwest are pushing smoke into the region, with National Weather Service forecasters […]

all.title: Where cyclosporiasis cases stand in Canada as U.S. parasite outbreak rages
all.description: Cyclosporiasis is an illness of the intestines caused by a parasite called cyclospora, which is only spread through eating food or drinking water that contains the parasite.

all.title: B.C. looking to seize millions in properties of alleged criminals
all.description: B.C.'s director of civil forfeiture is going after five properties connected to an international crackdown on crime groups linked to India.
